and generating a concise markdown report. This is a reproducibility and handoff
step; it does not change candidate scores or promote nominations to final
biological marker calls.

```{r step8-config}
step8_outputs <- list(
  output_manifest = file.path(output_dirs$logs, "workflow_output_manifest_step8.csv"),
  final_summary = file.path(output_dirs$tables, "workflow_final_summary_step8.csv"),
  final_shortlist = file.path(output_dirs$tables, "final_marker_followup_shortlist_step8.csv"),
  final_report = file.path(output_dirs$logs, "alpha_maturation_marker_scoring_final_report_step8.md"),
  final_state = file.path(output_dirs$state, "project_state_step8_final.rds"),
  status = file.path(output_dirs$state, "step8_status.txt")
)
```

```{r step8-helpers}
write_step8_csv <- function(data, path) {
  readr::write_csv(data, path)
}

write_step8_lines <- function(lines, path = step8_outputs$status) {
  writeLines(lines, con = path)
}

make_output_manifest <- function(...) {
  output_lists <- list(...)

  manifest_parts <- lapply(names(output_lists), function(step_name) {
    step_outputs <- output_lists[[step_name]]

    tibble::tibble(
      step = step_name,
      output_name = names(step_outputs),
      path = unname(unlist(step_outputs, use.names = FALSE))
    )
  })

  dplyr::bind_rows(manifest_parts) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      exists = file.exists(path),
      size_mb = dplyr::if_else(
        exists,
        round(file.info(path)$size / 1024^2, 3),
        NA_real_
      ),
      modified_time = dplyr::if_else(
        exists,
        as.character(file.info(path)$mtime),
        NA_character_
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(step, output_name)
}

build_final_summary <- function() {
  tibble::tibble(
    summary_metric = c(
      "alpha_cells",
      "alpha_genes",
      "candidate_gene_stage_rows",
      "review_table_rows",
      "validation_genes",
      "followup_nomination_rows",
      "followup_shortlist_rows",
      "regulatory_supported_genes",
      "advanced_candidates"
    ),
    value = as.character(c(
      ncol(human_combined_alpha_ready),
      nrow(human_combined_alpha_ready),
      nrow(gene_stage_marker_scores_step4),
      nrow(marker_review_table),
      dplyr::n_distinct(validation_gene_set$gene),
      nrow(followup_nomination_table),
      nrow(followup_stage_shortlist),
      sum(regulatory_support_scores$regulatory_support_status == "available"),
      sum(followup_nomination_table$followup_decision == "advance")
    ))
  )
}

build_final_shortlist <- function(shortlist_table) {
  shortlist_table |>
    dplyr::arrange(target_stage, nomination_stage_rank) |>
    dplyr::select(
      target_stage,
      nomination_stage_rank,
      gene,
      followup_decision,
      decision_reason,
      validation_pattern,
      marker_evidence_tier,
      strict_weighted_score,
      available_weighted_score,
      regulatory_support_status,
      expression_robustness_score,
      stage_specificity_score,
      validation_pct_margin,
      validation_mean_log2_fc,
      technical_caveat
    )
}

write_final_report <- function(outputs,
                               final_summary,
                               decision_summary,
                               output_manifest) {
  summary_lines <- paste0(
    "- ", final_summary$summary_metric, ": ", final_summary$value
  )

  decision_lines <- if (nrow(decision_summary) == 0) {
    "- No follow-up decisions were generated."
  } else {
    apply(decision_summary, 1, function(row) {
      paste0(
        "- ", row[["target_stage"]], " | ", row[["followup_decision"]],
        " | ", row[["validation_pattern"]], ": ", row[["n_genes"]], " genes"
      )
    })
  }

  missing_outputs <- output_manifest |>
    dplyr::filter(!exists) |>
    dplyr::mutate(label = paste0("- ", step, " / ", output_name, ": ", path)) |>
    dplyr::pull(label)

  if (length(missing_outputs) == 0) {
    missing_outputs <- "- No missing registered outputs at report-generation time."
  }

  # This report deliberately separates evidence-backed nominations from final
  # marker claims. That distinction is important for publication-quality
  # bioinformatics: computational prioritization should be reviewed against
  # biological context, independent datasets, and validation feasibility.
  report_lines <- c(
    "# Alpha Maturation Marker Scoring Final Report",
    "",
    paste("Generated:", as.character(Sys.time())),
    "",
    "## Scope",
    "",
    "This workflow starts from the existing integrated alpha cell object and builds a downstream marker scoring, regulatory support, validation, and nomination package. It does not re-run upstream scRNA-seq preprocessing, integration, clustering, or alpha subsetting.",
    "",
    "## Final Summary",
    "",
    summary_lines,
    "",
    "## Follow-Up Decision Summary",
    "",
    decision_lines,
    "",
    "## Key Final Outputs",
    "",
    paste("- Output manifest:", outputs$output_manifest),
    paste("- Final shortlist:", outputs$final_shortlist),
    paste("- Final summary:", outputs$final_summary),
    "",
    "## Missing Registered Outputs",
    "",
    missing_outputs,
    "",
    "## Interpretation Note",
    "",
    "The final shortlist contains computational follow-up nominations, not final validated biomarkers. Candidate genes should be reviewed for biological plausibility, orthogonal dataset support, stage specificity outside the current integrated object, and experimental validation feasibility before publication claims are made."
  )

  writeLines(report_lines, con = outputs$final_report)
}
```

```{r step8-finalize-handoff}
workflow_output_manifest <- make_output_manifest(
  step2 = step2_outputs,
  step3 = step3_outputs,
  step4 = step4_outputs,
  step5 = step5_outputs,
  step6 = step6_outputs,
  step7 = step7_outputs,
  step8 = step8_outputs
)

workflow_final_summary <- build_final_summary()
final_marker_followup_shortlist <- build_final_shortlist(followup_stage_shortlist)

write_step8_csv(workflow_output_manifest, step8_outputs$output_manifest)
write_step8_csv(workflow_final_summary, step8_outputs$final_summary)
write_step8_csv(final_marker_followup_shortlist, step8_outputs$final_shortlist)

write_final_report(
  outputs = step8_outputs,
  final_summary = workflow_final_summary,
  decision_summary = followup_decision_summary,
  output_manifest = workflow_output_manifest
)

project_state_step8 <- list(
  created_at = Sys.time(),
  project_root = project_root,
  workflow_complete_through_step = 8,
  alpha_stage_levels = alpha_stage_levels,
  final_summary = workflow_final_summary,
  output_manifest = workflow_output_manifest,
  step8_outputs = step8_outputs,
  session_info = utils::sessionInfo()
)

saveRDS(project_state_step8, step8_outputs$final_state)

write_step8_lines(
  c(
    "Step 8 completed: final reproducible handoff package generated.",
    paste("Output manifest:", step8_outputs$output_manifest),
    paste("Final summary:", step8_outputs$final_summary),
    paste("Final shortlist:", step8_outputs$final_shortlist),
    paste("Final report:", step8_outputs$final_report),
    paste("Registered outputs:", nrow(workflow_output_manifest)),
    paste("Missing registered outputs:", sum(!workflow_output_manifest$exists))
  )
)
```

```{r step8-display-summary}
workflow_final_summary

final_marker_followup_shortlist |>
  dplyr::group_by(target_stage) |>
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 15) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()
```

---

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
